SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-25-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:22am
Judge Pro Tem Morgan Prickett, clerk J. Kong, D525, not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellants: Dennis Doyle/Property manager appears with authorization from Frederick A Morse to appear on his behalf and with witness Arthur Mills/general contractor.
Respondents: Blair Wilson and Michael Manganaan appears as pro pers with witness James Kraus.

Parties, Previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Morgan Prickett.
